programme.title: Back From the End of the World
programme.desc: In 1994 the ABs did it tough. The "try from the end of the world" sealed France's first series win in NZ, and the Bledisloe in Sydney also went down in history. Those losses changed rugby in NZ and led to Jonah and the ABs taking the '95 RWC by storm.
